mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, MAX(p.title) AS title, MAX(p.content) AS content FROM Post p LEFT JOIN Like_Post lp ON lp.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= #{start} AND p.created_at < #{end} GROUP BY p.post_id ORDER BY COUNT(lp.post_id) DESC, MAX(p.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
